About: It is about a military leader.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the DC Comics character John Constantine.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by SSG and later Infinite Interactive.
DirectedBy: It was directed by Li Han-hsiang.
HasA: It has a sword and sorcery comics series.
IsA: It is a 1972 Hong Kong film.
It is a 1996 episode of Star Trek: Voyager.
It is an episode of the series I Spy.
It is the chief of an alien race called the "War Lords".
It is the fourth episode of the 1965 Doctor Who serial The Crusade.
It is a Hong Kong manhua.
It is a sword and sorcery comics series.
It is a 1983–1987 series of novels.
It is a series of computer games.
It is the first game in the series.
It is a collectible card game.
It is a collectible card game.
It is a game released by Atari in 1980.
It is a Dungeons & Dragons character class.
It is a fused mash-up version of characters.
It is a ring name of a professional wrestler.
It is a militant African-American youth organization.
It is a call sign of a United States Navy helicopter squadron.
It is a deactivated United States Marine Corps fighter squadron.
KnownAs: It is known as War Lord.
KnownFor: It is known for starring Andy Lau, Jet Li and Takeshi Kaneshiro.
It is known for being the first game in the series.
It is known for being the first expansion pack to the Civilization IV game series.
It is known for being a Dungeons & Dragons character class.
PartOf: It is part of The Saxon Stories.
It is part of The Outlaw Chronicles.
It is part of the Makaum War series.
It is part of the Britannia trilogy.
It is part of the Bellevue series novels.
It is part of the Time Hunters series novels.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Reaper Miniatures.
UsedAs: It is used as a ring name.
It is used as a call sign.
It is used as a character class.
UsedFor: It is used for a sword and sorcery comics series.
UsedIn: It is used in Mortal Kombat 1.
WrittenBy: It was written by Wan Yuet Long.
It was written by John Shirley.
It was written by Bob Langley.
It was written by Jason Frost.
It was written by Malcolm Bosse.
It was written by Janet Morris.
It was written by Kevin D. Randle.
It was written by Elizabeth Elliott.
It was written by David Drake and S. M. Stirling.
It was written by Matt Braun.
It was written by Jennifer Fallon.
It was written by Angela Knight.
It was written by Ted Bell.
It was written by Angus Donald.
It was written by Richard Denham and M. J. Trow.
It was written by Chris Ryan.
It was written by Bernard Cornwell.
It was written by Mel Odom.
